modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Headset not charging on Cisco IP Phone.

full_description_text:  
- I'm having trouble with my wireless headset; it won't charge at all.  
- Because of this, I can't use it with my Cisco IP Phone.  
- It's really frustrating since I rely on it for calls.
short_description: Headset not charging on Cisco IP Phone.
description:
- I'm having trouble with my wireless headset; it won't charge at all.  
- Because of this, I can't use it with my Cisco IP Phone.  
- It's really frustrating since I rely on it for calls.
